case_title: ROSEMARY DO VS. MISHIN GALLERY LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DO, ROSEMARY DBA ARTFUNATIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISHIN GALLERY LLC DBA MISHIN FINE ARTS $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,630.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
